name: Fayette County Soldiers and Sailors Memorial Building
description: Come play pickleball at Fayette County Soldiers and Sailors Memorial Building in Fayetteville, WV! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Gripped Fitness & Pickleball
description: Gripped Fitness & Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fayetteville, WV. There are 4 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Midland Trail Community Center
description: Midland Trail Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ansted, WV. There are 3 indoor wood courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: North of the New Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at North of the New Pickleball in Ansted, WV! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.
fees: Private — 5 bucks per person every Sunday

name: Town of Pax Pickelball
description: Come play pickleball at Town of Pax Pickelball in Oak Hill, WV! You'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
